honest-alerts/src/honest_alerts/lifecycl: Emptying the vocabulary type-name key "alert_state". honest_type.state_machine builds its state set through _names, which reads the members from the recognizer values and never the type-name key, so alert_lifecycle (states, events, transitions, terminal) is identical whether the key is "alert_state" or "". The built machine retains no reference to the vocabulary name, so no conformance case can observe it. Verified equivalent by reading _names in honest_type/state_machine.py.

Emptying the vocabulary type-name key "alert_event". Same invariance as alert_state: _names reads the event members from the recognizer values and discards the type-name key, so the machine's events and every transition are identical whether the key is "alert_event" or "". No conformance case can observe the discarded name. Verified equivalent.
